_meta.title: Cheer Ascension
_meta.premise: Kelsey Brandt, 22, newest member of the pro-am Comets squad, drinks the team's experimental 'Comet Fuel' shake and gets fitter, stronger and more stunning with every page. Single-character story; 6 full-bleed pages; photoreal 3D CGI / DAZ Iray style; always_clothed: true (uniform strains but always fully covers).
_meta.cast_rule: Kelsey ONLY — no background extras, no squad-mates, ever.
_meta.palette: Comets colors: deep teal + gold + white (ORIGINAL design — no real-team or Daz-product trade dress)

panels.action: Golden-hour practice field. Kelsey alone mid-routine: pom-poms raised in a V, one knee popped, beaming with team-captain energy. Empty bleachers behind her.
panels.costume_state: kelsey: teal-and-gold Comets uniform, crisp and fitted

panels.action: Water break at the sideline bench. Kelsey lifts the team's new 'Comet Fuel' shaker bottle (teal liquid, faint glow) and drinks deep; her free hand rests on her hip; a first pleasant shiver crosses her face.

GROWTH-PROGRESSIVE page: three vertical sub-panels, same framing. Stage 1: she studies her own raised arm, curious. Stage 2: a sleek line of new muscle draws itself along the arm, uniform sleeve-band going snug; delighted gasp. Stage 3: toned shoulders and arms, top now fitted like a glove; thrilled grin.
panels.costume_state: kelsey: GROWTH page — uniform goes from crisp to snug, fully covering throughout

panels.action: Showcase: Kelsey nails a toe-touch jump at peak height, pom-poms flared, new athletic build obvious — sculpted shoulders, toned core, powerful legs — uniform taut and fully covering. Pure joy.

GROWTH-PROGRESSIVE page: three vertical sub-panels, same framing, sunset deepening. Stage 1: she flexes an arm experimentally — bicep rises. Stage 2: shoulders cap and broaden, waistband and sleeve-bands straining white at the seams yet holding, fully covering; she laughs. Stage 3: fitness-cover physique — capped delts, carved abs faintly showing through the taut top, uniform at its limit but intact; radiant, confident smirk.
panels.costume_state: kelsey: GROWTH page — uniform strains to its limit, seams whitening, ALWAYS fully covering

panels.action: Finale under stadium lights just switched on: Kelsey in the Comets' rebuilt pro uniform sized to her new physique, planted in a victorious wide stance at the 50-yard stripe, pom-poms on hips, chin up — the hottest, strongest version of herself, owning the empty stadium.
panels.costume_state: kelsey: rebuilt pro uniform, fitted to her new build
